title: DMC's Improvements
description: Many quality-of-life features to make your gameplay more fun and rewarding!
body:
![DMC Improvements Banner Picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a69444c495983ea81dce568b8b7c4faa83dd19e5.png)

# Welcome to DMC's Improvements ✨
## A professional mod designed to enhance vanilla Minecraft gameplay with quality-of-life features and exciting additions 🔥
## 
## What's been added so far:


</details>

### New Dimension Features:
The Ancient City Portal Frame leads to a new dimension, featuring a new ore and unique structure to discover.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a19761140b5a581de113053635ea7183e12624e9_0.webp)

**Learn more 👇**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Echo Flint and Steel

Surround a Flint and Steel with 8 Echo Shards to craft it, then right-click the Ancient City's Frame to open a portal to the Deeper Dark dimension.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46ae724ac3db891e69f1b84bd69a28580a088aef.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac25fddaac5a831931ccf5cf55605c1915a271a4_0.webp)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Deep Dark Wastes & Ender Ghast

The only biome in the Deeper Dark dimension. Here, you'll encounter the Ender Ghast, a small Ghast that cannot shoot fireballs. It teleports and flies when provoked by eye contact, then attacks in melee when close.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d286df2968d167d660661653dc3679e6a2cb22b_0.webp)

Bonus Fact: Ender Ghasts have a 10% chance to drop a Dragon Egg when defeated.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Herobrine

You'll also encounter a rare new mob you definitely don't want to meet… The Herobrine. 😨

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ecfb6ce4081a29be948f0aecb605d43df881210_0.webp)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Herobrine Shrine

A dungeon structure that can generate in the new dimension. Rumors say there are many secrets to uncover here… maybe even a new villager!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bb13902d00fd4254d65660b0513c370e99169cc_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88a20018ceba5cd50cc6395dc8a7998e13f7ffdb_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad27221e61582eb91aca5fecc51f5d6fa7afefe5.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Ancient Obsidian Debris

A rare ore found deep underground in the Deep Dark Wastes, completely encased in obsidian.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ced7b30d47d56860c5f0190f610b24b21e09208.png)

**Note:** Ancient Obsidian Debris and Ancient Debris now drop their yield directly when mined. No smelting is required, and the Fortune enchantment increases the amount.

Requires a Diamond Pickaxe or higher.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Ancient Obsidian Ingot

Combine 4 Netherite Scrap and 4 Ancient Obsidian Scrap to craft it.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87003ae024b07dc7ffae7d1bfa727f566ea80e40.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Magic Obsidian Upgrade

Use this Smithing Template to upgrade your Netherite Armor and Tools into Magic Obsidian✨

Can be found in Herobrine Shrine Chests.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7afbde18bcd9212daa633b8e7f06ddabfd01fd93.png)

Can be duplicated using a dragon egg and 7 netherite ingots.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/432437bb3f54b3b27c46b85bf5d34d89153eca7f.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Magic Obsidian Armor and Tools

Much stronger than Netherite and naturally fireproof.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e01e3db22639451c95a0e0fd34d2024d4c3c923e.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0c613264010058f585b7a514d69a8334d7aba97.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
</details>

### Villager Proffesions & Unique Structures:

Discover new villager jobs and explore exclusive buildings throughout your adventures.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f11d515fe542dbe970fd186de43c8e13d0400db_0.webp)

**Learn more 👇**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **New Villager Profession: Beekeeper**

A brand-new villager that specializes in bees and honey!

🏠 Can be found in a unique house that generates naturally in the **Plains** and **Meadow** biomes.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f11d515fe542dbe970fd186de43c8e13d0400db_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8691ad8166be9585d555467c173bd92d22cd6f43.png)

🍯 Trades **honey-related items** and can be leveled up all the way to **Master**.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b621fb479c7710124e0341baecfd8f986d8737c.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/826518c7ee42a59903cb6866dedab0faae62d5ab.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### New Villager Profession: Egg Summoner

Discover a mysterious villager imprisoned in the **Herobrine Shrine.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c8b8a9108051c90f2e8c1a92735faed35d8209e.png)

Trades **spawn eggs** and can progress all the way to **Master level.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39f595a9aa15a19461656b94b7ab869068a01908.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b911c025c6245122c223598a7bb695287e061513.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Desert Pyramid (Badlands)

A rare badlands variant of the Desert Pyramid. Built from red sandstone and terracotta, this structure hides trapped chests instead of regular chests, making it a bit more dangerous for careless explorers.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34ce87872b7295aa770c5d1fed9e5019c667de6d.png)

</details>

New Block Variants, Decorative Flowers & Useful Functional Blocks.

### **Beacon Base Blocks**

Beacons can now be powered using **Amethyst, Copper (in all oxidation stages)**, and **Ancient Obsidian** blocks, giving you more creative options when building your beacon base!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6218f22312a3493dc821ae7a959f64b971a0b730_0.webp)

### Block of Charcoal

Similar to a Block of Coal, this block burns for a while when ignited before disappearing.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/818b2e2a65c4d43fcb050932fb10364c4252d034.png)

# **New Decorative Flowers:**

### **[Buttercup🌻](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Earth:Buttercup)**

A new decorative flower that brightens up your world.

**Generation:** Spawns naturally in the Flower Forest biome. 🌸

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaab5d94dedb71f93b49c2cd5a68b29867bc0200_0.webp)

**Drops:** Can also be obtained as a rare drop from **Mooblooms** upon death. 🐄🌼

**Use:** Can be crafted into **Yellow Dye** or placed decoratively. 🎨

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a2ab21424e233c104313ba717e992086804c1a.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### **[Pink Daisy🌷](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Earth:Pink_Daisy)**

A delicate new flower that adds charm to your world.

**Generation:** Spawns naturally in the Cherry Grove biome. 🌸

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59cf631f8e01f65ea3294951b1d6554d208907be_0.webp)

**Drops:** Can also be obtained as a rare drop from **Moolips** upon death. 🐄🌷

**Use:** Can be crafted into **Pink Dye** or placed decoratively. 🎨

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c7e40aca22ad4a6d78df2c17b6f3130a7e4c16d.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# New Functional Blocks:

### **[Wind Bearing](https://create.fandom.com/wiki/Windmill_Bearing)**

Inspired by the Create mod, this block gives a unique purpose to the **Wind Charge** item. When you stand on top of it, it emits a **repeating wind charge sound** to signal that you can jump. Activating it launches you about **14 blocks into the air**, and it **negates fall damage** if you land on the same Y-level from where you started.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cb40180a18ec49466cf6fc60ef11f87a35e191a.gif)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39797b804d81a7d721830b03b12eaafb1dbe5cdb.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### **Honey Extractor**

A new functional block found in the **Beekeeper House**. It serves as the profession block for the **Beekeeper Villager**, who uses it to unlock and trade honey-related items as they level up.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11cd0cb3d276323e49e4e58b212a79a058513b29.png)

Can also be crafted using 4 Planks + 2 Honeycombs.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4c6dee6b2dbbc05bfc864089ba9b34f82d432bb.png)

Place a Honeycomb and a Glass Bottle in this block to craft a Honey Bottle and Crystallized Honey.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06650b3f3824fb106ca7913b0be1f0dab0cf7ed6.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7ae6c9d36f589a8f6d2fef1a102fb9a0d6ac31d.png)

</details>

### Gameplay Enhancements:
Enhanced mining mechanics, new tools and armor, and additional utilities.

# New Overworld Ore:

### Netherite Deepslate Ore

**Generation:** Spawns exclusively in the Deep Dark biome from Y=-45 and below.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3f4a389f8e1d6ba0f03b4e90ec290e46c03b13.png)

**Drops:** When mined, it yields two distinct Netherite Shards.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49bb09cea83c9b02626f0a908d45bf30d7205e21.png)

**Small Netherite Shards** - can be combined into large ones.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb98967eb1db81fbcb3396472fdb4761aebba52a.png)

**Large Netherite Shards** - can be combined into ancient debris.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e72fcfee7cff41dbaa760bf39952d08129962bc0.png)

**Bonus Fact:** Large Netherite Shards have a 10% chance to drop.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# New Mining Improvements:

### Ore Nuggets

Occasionally drops while mining Stone or Deepslate.

Can be crafted into its regular material form.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5d2447edcb634c81a33c0c9528045afe29f5a43.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f82bc19e80cdf5d317d17ad287fd283f3efb25f0.png)

A single torch can be crafted using 2 coal nuggets and a stick.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/797722ed5e57ff8ee1c2c5d926368984dcdcdbf4.png)

### Charcoal Nugget

Crafted exclusively from charcoal — the only way to get it!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f03fc069ed0b319af1a8a9491d2876c9065bcd76.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/623e0846d44577367e46bff1eb9144b1d3b7a258.png)

A single torch can be crafted using 2 charcoal nuggets and a stick.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb9dc65ad7e8c80bb95620398f534441447d42bc.png)

**Bonus Fact:** You can smelt one item using a single Coal/Charcoal Nugget!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d2c6d854d5730cc71ee396433426f35eb71733b.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27759c5ea21bcd3a0a97b601df177bf8853a47a6.png)

### Resin Nugget

Can only be obtained by smelting Resin Tools & Armor or by crafting Resin Bricks back into them.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d51d0fe6fc8b9ccb33cef17db2c249b133e677ef.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c956929a3372c83e85072a80d3fac5a2b497e82.png)

**All the Nuggets You Could Possibly Get!**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3538687d5f4e2911a315be0a028565ffc9186c47.png)

# New Projectile:

### Pebble

A throwable projectile that **deals damage to entities.**

Drops from **Dirt** and, rarely, from **Grass Blocks.**

Can also be crafted into Cobblestone.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ee0c5b37ebe347962d59b0261f896d70edb4e9.png)

**Pebbles** – Can also be crafted into 9 of them from a single Cobblestone.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f84eb5f0fb20d7f85099857fe2482425dd2929e9.png)

**_Note:_**

**When thrown from the main hand:** launches 2 pebbles at a time and deals increased damage.

**When thrown from the off hand:** launches 1 pebble at a time and deals less damage.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# New Utilities:

### Wooden Shears

Crafted using **2 planks** of any type.

Weaker than regular Shears but **still effective** for harvesting **plants** and **leaves.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41700cf70c6ca877ab9db76c578da1d4eda38130.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Ceramic Shears

Crafted using **2 Bricks.**

Slightly weaker than regular Shears, but **much more efficient** for harvesting **wool** and **leaves.**

If you don’t want to waste your iron on shears, crafting multiple of these will get the job done perfectly!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bea11f90153e97c818e791ec6cd65d964367214.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# New Tools And Armor:

Craft Emerald, Resin and Amethyst Tools, Weapons & Armor using Resin Bricks, Emerald Gemstones, and Amethyst Shards.

An Emerald Nugget can be crafted into an Emerald Gemstone.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96bd8746a7e3320d0cd48174a7e7387f8d187744.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df278387d258c851ab4b21e544ec1215d923fddd.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b7ff645328f748cdcd1c3da0cf0aa42dfa3efb3.png)

**Bonus Fact:** Emerald Gemstones now drop from mining Emerald and Deepslate Emerald Ores, while Villager and Wandering Trader trades still use regular emeralds.

**_Note:_** Emerald Gemstones can be crafted from Emerald Nuggets.

## **Tools and Armor Compared to Vanilla Ones:**

# New Weapons:

### Double Axes

**Double Axes** are **powerful tiered tools and melee weapons** designed to **combine the utility of an axe** with the **strength of a heavier weapon.**

Each **Double Axe** deals **higher damage** than its **standard axe counterpart** and has **+0.5 mining efficiency**, making it slightly more effective at **harvesting blocks** while still being primarily a **weapon**.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bf0ed49d193c3af40fa2f16e07121f16d341a17.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Spears

Spears now feature new and improved models ✨👌

You can craft Resin, Amethyst, Emerald, and Magic Obsidian spears.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f442eb17686b7b67978dbb60ded2472eceaa8484.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Material Horns:

Can be crafted by combining any Goat Horn with 3 of its specific materials.

Each horn plays a different sound.

### Copper Horn

Reintroduces the Copper Horn that was removed from Minecraft Bedrock Edition.

**New functionality:** when used underwater, it grants extra oxygen for 30 seconds before the air bubbles start to deplete.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a2e828965e85006d4643be059171b4c432e46a9.png)

### Amethyst Horn

**New Functionality:** Removes Blindness effect

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd3ed83f3629bcd8201158c157cc5726d56723c0.png)

### Redstone Horn

**New Functionality:** Removes Hunger effect.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e94b69b4caa5cf9a919456745f0cbae5a4409cee.png)

### Iron Horn

**New Functionality:** Resets the freezing animation when sinking in Powder Snow, helping you escape safely.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a43b5d40344b8a3ba225377f922ac24f68a110f.png)

### Quartz Horn

**New Functionality:** Grants the Fire Resistance effect for 3 seconds when used.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81b11556764117acf174f30632a86420f980caa2.png)

### Golden Horn

When used in the main hand, grants Invisibility.

When used in the off-hand, cancels Invisibility.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be54f875eaaca301714123a1b59d548c5b3adc53.png)

### Diamond Horn

**New Functionality:** When used while falling, it resets your fall distance as long as you are close to hitting the ground, preventing fall damage.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dd99a88a18f0ca0602eb39d655a1f2acb7aac94.png)

### Emerald Horn

**New Functionality:** When used while falling, it resets your fall distance as long as you are close to hitting the ground, preventing fall damage.

Can also remove the Nausea effect.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95380efb6cf30fb67b528af581b0b4bc9c5c1f70.png)

### Netherite Horn

Can be obtained by upgrading a Diamond Horn in a Smithing Table.

**New Functionality:** Extinguishes the player while on fire and removes the Wither effect.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76215964a728b875042f14027ad7162ec7ac9567.png)

### Echo Horn

**New Functionality:** Removes the Darkness effect when used.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c60f2b01e380bf7134b6aa9cd73feca5b17615e.png)

**Showcase of All New Horns:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a2028499f06882cbf43f372b3eca338dfb8edda.png)

### Mobs & Creatures:
New Cows, Zombie Variants & More, bringing your world to life 🌸

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06166940f43c6f00f171442705042df9b0142f55_0.webp)

**Learn more 👇**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **[Moobloom](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Earth:Moobloom)**

The Moobloom is a new mob originally featured in Minecraft Earth. It was one of the candidates in the **Minecraft Live 2020 mob vote**, but ultimately lost to the Glow Squid.

**Spawn:** Found in the Flower Forest biome.

**Breeding & Tempting:** Can be tempted and bred using Buttercups and Wheat.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/335041db6c3aae0ddc82806387e8df796d27aba2_0.webp)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### **[Moolip](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Earth:Moolip)**

The Moolip is a new mob originally introduced in Minecraft Earth. It is a pink variant of the Moobloom.

**Spawn:** Found in the Cherry Grove biome.

**Breeding & Tempting:** Can be tempted and bred using Pink Daisies and Wheat.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32a8fabe7c988ee3f683ea625964852388a62c25_0.webp)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### **[Muddy Pig](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Earth:Muddy_Pig)**

Originally from Minecraft Earth, this variant of the pig can **rarely spawn** in the Mangrove Swamp biome. Covered in mud, it’s just as friendly as regular pigs but has a unique look.

Each Honeycomb can be crafted into 9 Crystallized Honey pieces. Eating them cures poison instantly and is twice as fast as eating regular foods (similar to Dried Kelp).

Crafted by surrounding an Apple with Crystallized Honey. Eating it cures Poison, Slowness, and Weakness effects, making it especially useful against Witches!

Can be obtained rarely as a drop from Oak or Dark Oak leaves.

Restores the same Hunger and Saturation as a regular apple when eaten.

Can be used to craft Golden Apples, just like regular apples.

# Mob Drops:

### Warden

Now drop **1–2 Echo Shards** upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Witch

Now has a 50% chance to drop **4–8 Lapis Lazuli** upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Villager

Drops a few **Emeralds** and other **villager-related items**, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Husk

Drops **1–3 Sand** upon death, and **Cooked Rotten Flesh** when killed while **on fire** or with **Fire Aspect.**

### Parched

Drops **1–3 Sand** upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting**.

### Pig

Now drops **Leather** upon death.

### Chickens

Each Has a **50% chance** to drop a **specific egg** upon death, depending on the **chicken’s type.**

### Bee

Drops **Poppy** or **Dandelion**, with a rare chance to drop **Cornflower** or **Lily of the Valley.**

### Salmon, Cod, Pufferfish, Tropical Fish

Each has a **25% chance** to drop **0–2 Bones** upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Axolotl

Drops **0–2 Tropical Fish**, with rare chances to drop **Ink Sacs** or other types of fish.

### Turtles

Now drops Seagrass, Kelp, Sea Pickle and Scute, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Nautilues & Zombie Nautiluses

Now have a small chance to drop **Pufferfish** upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting**.

### Frogs

Drops **0–2 Slimeballs** upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Allay

Drops 0-1 **Amethyst Shards** on death, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Sniffer

Drops **0–2 Torchflower** Seeds upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

It can also be used to discover **Golden Dandelions, Ender Eyes, Phantom Membranes,** and even a **Snoft Pottery Sherd**, in addition to its usual **Ancient Seeds.**

### Armadillo

Has a small chance to drop an **Armadillo Scute,** and a **10% chance** to drop a **Spider Eye.**

### Creaking

Now drops **Sticks** and **Resin** upon death, with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Happy Ghast

Drops **Snowballs** and rarely a **Ghast Tear**,  with **increased drops when using Looting.**

### Vex

Has an **extremely rare chance** to drop a **damaged Iron Sword** upon death, when **killed by the player.**

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Block Drops:

### Grass, Tall Grass, Tall Dry Grass, Fern, Large Fern, Bush

Now have a small chance to drop **Sticks** when broken.

### Dead Bush & Tall Dry Grass

Now have a **very rare** chance to drop an **Armadillo Scute.**

### Grass Block, Dirt, Coarse Dirt, Rooted Dirt, Podzol, Mycelium, Dirt Path, Sand, Red Sand, Moss, Pale Moss

These blocks can now **occasionally drop random useful items.**

_Dirt Path_ can now also be **obtained with a Silk Touch tool.**

### Jungle Leaves

Increased **Jungle Sapling** drop rate from **2.5% → 5%,** matching other tree types.

### Budding Amethyst

Has a **tiny chance** to drop **0–3 Amethyst Nuggets.**

Can now also drop itself when mined with a **Silk Touch Pickaxe.**

</details>
